news.headline: Lone Star acquires Carrier's fire business for $3 billion, forming Kidde Global Solutions; creating trusted fire safety brands.
news.summary: Lone Star Funds confirmed the acquisition of Carrier Global Corporation’s Commercial and Residential Fire business for $3 billion. The business will now operate independently as Kidde Global Solutions, merging renowned fire and life safety brands.

news.headline: One Source in Raleigh, NC rebrands to emphasize tech leadership support. Offers expanded services in networking and cybersecurity.
news.summary: One Source, a tech company based in Raleigh, North Carolina, has launched a rebranding effort to emphasize its dedication to assisting technology leaders in navigating the challenges of the modern digital environment. Renowned for its top-notch services in technology expense management and managed security, the company has unveiled a fresh appearance and communication strategy reflecting its expanded proficiency across a wider array of technologies such as networking, customer experience solutions, and data center management. This initiative signals One Source's commitment to providing comprehensive tech solutions.

news.headline: EDX appoints new CEO Tony Acuña-Rohter, with former CEO Jamil Nazarali as Executive Chair. Acuña-Rohter was previously Chief Technology Officer.
news.summary: In Hoboken, New Jersey, EDX Markets Holding Co., Inc. (EDX) revealed that Jamil Nazarali, the existing CEO, will now serve as the Executive Chair of the EDX Board. Tony Acuña-Rohter has been appointed as the new CEO. Acuña-Rohter, who joined in 2022, previously held the role of Chief Technology Officer at EDX, overseeing technology and information security operations. The transition marks a significant change in leadership within the company, with EDX being recognized as a prominent digital asset technology firm offering an institution-only trading venue paired with a central clearinghouse.

news.headline: Lumin Digital gets $160M in growth funding to boost business expansion.
news.summary: Lumin Digital, based in San Ramon, California, has secured significant funding to support its expanding operations and maintain its positive trajectory. The company, known for its advanced digital banking solutions, revealed today that it has successfully raised more than $160 million in growth equity financing. This capital injection will enable Lumin Digital to further accelerate its business growth and capitalize on existing momentum in the industry.

news.headline: Trellix gains AWS Generative AI Competency in Las Vegas, offering faster detection & response with Trellix Helix Connect.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, Trellix, a cybersecurity firm, has earned the Amazon Web Services (AWS) Generative AI Competency for its Trellix Helix Connect platform. Utilizing Amazon Bedrock, Trellix Helix Connect, coupled with Trellix Wise, offers users accelerated detection, streamlined investigation, and enhanced response abilities to bolster operational resilience. This solution is adept at autonomously conducting a comprehensive initial investigation.

news.headline: Uptiq.AI acquires UpSwot to strengthen enterprise AI platform with enhanced data integration for financial institutions.
news.summary: In a recent development, Uptiq, based in Dallas, has successfully acquired UpSwot. This strategic move aims to bolster Uptiq's AI platform by incorporating advanced data integration capabilities. By doing so, Uptiq seeks to cater specifically to financial institutions, offering them enhanced tools to extract actionable insights. This acquisition marks a significant step forward for Uptiq as it looks to expand its reach and services.

news.headline: Global CAM Software Market to reach USD 5.69 billion by 2030 with a CAGR of 9.0% from USD 3.39 billion in 2024.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida on December 2, 2024, it was reported that the worldwide CAM Software Market is projected to increase from USD 3.39 billion in 2024 to USD 5.69 billion by 2030. This growth represents a 9.0% compound annual growth rate (CAGR) over the forecast period, as revealed in a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™. This expansion is attributed to the increasing demand for...

news.headline: Global flight planning software market set to reach $1.29B by 2031 as tech giants dominate.ụcDriven by aircraft orders, fleet growth.
news.summary: The worldwide market for flight planning software is anticipated to experience significant growth, with estimates pointing to a rise to $1.29 billion by the year 2031. This notable expansion is fueled by a growing number of orders and deliveries of narrow body aircraft, as well as the continuous increase in the global aircraft fleet size and air traffic volume...

news.headline: FourKites resolves two legal disputes with project44 over employee hiring and emails after five years. Glad to move forward.
news.summary: Chicago-based FourKites recently settled two legal disputes with project44. The first issue stemmed from FourKites objecting to project44 hiring two of its employees. The second matter involved project44's prior complaint about emails sent by FourKites CEO Mathew Elenjickal to three individuals connected to project44 five years ago. Elenjickal expressed relief at resolving these conflicts, stating, "We are glad to put these disputes behind us."

news.headline: Dow Jones and small caps rise over 1%, Nvidia rallies, but Google stock impacts tech sector.
news.summary: On Thursday, the Dow Jones index showed strong performance, leading the major indexes. Nvidia stock experienced a late rally in trading hours despite a majority of the day in decline. The Dow Jones and small caps surged over 1%, but the tech sector was weighed down by Google stock. This information was covered live without mentioning the specific source.

news.headline: Canadian exports facing 25% tariff threat from incoming US president. Trudeau hopeful to prevent escalation.
news.summary: The president-elect has announced plans to implement a 25 percent tariff on all Canadian exports, but Prime Minister Trudeau is optimistic about preventing this measure from being implemented.

news.headline: Super Micro's special committee did not find any misconduct, stated Bloomberg.
Unmanned Combat Aerial Vehicle (UCAV) market estimated to reach $4546.1 million by 2030 with various segmentation.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, as of December 2, 2024, the Unmanned Combat Aerial Vehicle (UCAV) market is categorized based on type into Medium-Altitude UCAV and High-Altitude UCAV. Furthermore, it is segmented by application into Transportation, Fighting, Rescue, and Reconnaissance. The worldwide Unmanned Combat Aerial Vehicle (UCAV) Market statistics indicate significant activity in this sector.

news.headline: Citi divides Mexico ops, 93% staff to IPO.
Extended Black Friday sales running throughout the weekend and beyond.(QtCore: Bloomberg)
Quantum computing set to have $1 trillion economic impact, with rising cyberattack threats highlighted.
news.summary: In a recent commentary from Scope Technologies Corp, it was highlighted that the risk of a cyberattack in the US has reached unprecedented levels. Reports indicate a concerning escalation of cyber threats, with analyses from Amazon's Chief Information Officer revealing the severity of the situation. This update, released on Dec. 2, 2024, underscores the growing concern surrounding cybersecurity, emphasizing the urgent need for heightened vigilance and preventive measures in light of these escalating risks.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures drop, Nvidia stock falls; Federal Reserve's inflation data awaited.Indices ↓, Nvidia stock at key level. Fed inflation gauge release upcoming.
news.summary: Dow Jones futures declined as Nvidia stock dropped significantly on Monday, reaching a crucial threshold. This week, the Federal Reserve is set to release its primary inflation gauge. The market is closely watching for this key data amid the evolving economic landscape. Investors are monitoring these developments as they navigate potential impacts on the financial markets.

news.headline: Castle Water plans to provide £4 billion equity to save Thames Water.
Brookfield Infrastructure renews normal course issuer bids for LP Units and Preferred Units; TSX accepts notice filings.
news.summary: In Brookfield, news dated November 27, 2024, Brookfield Infrastructure Partners L.P. ("BIP") disclosed that the Toronto Stock Exchange has approved their notice to renew their normal course issuer bid for outstanding LP Units and Preferred Units. Additionally, Brookfield Infrastructure Corporation ("BIPC") shared that the TSX has accepted their notice to renew the issuer bid for outstanding Exchangeable Shares. BIP trades on the NYSE and TSX under BIP and BIP.UN, while BIPC trades on NYSE and TSX as BIPC.

news.headline: Are loyalty programs worth it for airlines? Some passengers have ditched chasing status amidst changing programs.
news.summary: A growing number of travelers, fed up with the fluctuating airline rewards programs, have shifted away from pursuing status and are now employing alternative strategies for booking flights and managing credit cards.

news.headline: Bob Cousy credits luck for NBA legacy, hailed as first great point guard with hard work.
news.summary: Bob Cousy, known as the first outstanding point guard in the NBA, attributed his success to hard work and a stroke of luck. In a recent interview, Cousy highlighted the importance of both factors in shaping his legacy. His contributions to the sport have not only solidified his name in basketball history but have also inspired many aspiring players. Although his journey was not devoid of challenges, Cousy's dedication to his craft and some fortunate turns of events ultimately led to his remarkable achievements in the world of professional basketball.

news.headline: SickKids employees demanding access to HOOPP pension plan for fair treatment. Rally on Dec 3. Staff excluded despite providing exceptional care.
news.summary: In Toronto, SickKids workers are set to protest on December 3, 2024, seeking inclusion in the Healthcare of Ontario Pension Plan (HOOPP). These employees, who deliver outstanding care to children and families, are currently ineligible for HOOPP, a widely accessible pension program for most hospital staff in the region. The predominantly female and racially diverse workforce at SickKids argue that their current pension scheme puts their financial security at risk. They describe it as inadequate and insufficient for their needs, highlighting the disparity compared to their counterparts in the industry.

news.headline: Expel partners with Wiz Defend for Cloud MDR services, enhances security against cloud attacks.
news.summary: Expel, a top managed detection and response (MDR) provider based in Herndon, Virginia, has introduced Cloud MDR services that have been enhanced by Wiz Defend. As one of the few providers certified by Wiz, Expel now offers a combination of Wiz Defend Cloud Detection and Response (CDR) and their own outstanding MDR services. This collaboration allows Expel to utilize Wiz Defend’s comprehensive cloud detections to detect and prevent advanced cloud attacks effectively. These services are aimed at enhancing cybersecurity and minimizing the risk of cloud-based threats.

news.headline: Company buys Bitcoin for the fourth consecutive week as part of its investment strategy
UniFirst No. 9 Chevy to debut new look for 2025 NASCAR season. NYSE: UNF unveils fresh paint scheme.
news.summary: In Wilmington, Massachusetts on December 2, 2024, UniFirst Corporation, a prominent company on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol UNF, specializing in tailored business uniform services, facility supplies, and safety products, has introduced an eye-catching new design for the UniFirst No. 9.

news.headline: Nasdaq up 100 points, Li Auto delivers 48,740 vehicles in Nov, rising 18.8% YOY but down 5.3% from the previous month.
news.summary: Stocks in the U.S. opened higher today, with the Nasdaq Composite increasing by over 100 points. The Dow rose by 0.09% to 44,953.54, the NASDAQ gained 0.54% to 19,322.17, and the S&P 500 also saw a 0.21% increase to 6,045.08. Consumer discretionary shares surged by 1.3%, while real estate shares experienced a 0.6% decline. Li Auto Inc. (NASDAQ: LI) reported delivering 48,740 vehicles in November, an 18.8% increase from the previous year but a 5.3% decrease from October's 51,443 deliveries. Visit Benzinga.com for the full story.

news.headline: Binance Pool rolls out 88,000 KAS bonus for BTC and Kaspa miners from Nov. 28, 2024 to Jan. 27, 2025.
news.summary: Binance Pool has announced a promotional offering in which eligible miners of Kaspa (KAS) and Bitcoin (BTC) can receive a bonus of 88,000 KAS. This promotion will be active from November 28, 2024, until January 27, 2025.

news.headline: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) to report EPS of $2.44 on Dec. 3. Analysts optimistic, past EPS beats impacted prices by up to 20%. Stock at $329.99, up 32.59% in the last year. Analysts forecast 8.31% upside with Outperform rating.
news.summary: Salesforce is set to release its quarterly earnings on December 3, with analysts expecting an EPS of $2.44. Investors are hopeful for positive news and guidance. In the last quarter, the company beat EPS estimates by $0.45, resulting in a 0.73% drop in share price the next day. Over the last year, Salesforce shares have risen by 32.59% to $329.99. Analysts rate the stock as Outperform, with an average price target of $357.42, suggesting an 8.31% potential upside. It's essential for investors to consider guidance as a key factor in stock performance.

news.headline: Binance launches Pyth Network (PYTH) on BNSOL Super Stake, providing APR Boost Airdrop for staking SOL.
news.summary: Binance has revealed the introduction of Pyth Network (PYTH) on the BNSOL Super Stake platform. Users can now receive PYTH APR Boost Airdrop Rewards by staking SOL into BNSOL. This initiative aims to attract more users to participate in staking, capitalizing on the benefits of the PYTH token. By integrating PYTH into the BNSOL ecosystem, users stand to gain rewards and enhance their overall staking experience.

news.headline: Trump considering new candidates for Treasury Secretary after making numerous Cabinet picks. Warsh and Rowan among invitees to Mar-a-Lago.
news.summary: This week, President-elect Donald J. Trump plans to extend invitations to potential candidates for a particular role, such as Kevin Warsh and Marc Rowan, to visit Mar-a-Lago.

news.headline: Inotiv (NASDAQ: NOTV) set to release earnings on 12/3. Analysts predict EPS of -$0.67. Investors hopeful for positive results.
news.summary: Inotiv (NASDAQ: NOTV) is scheduled to announce its quarterly earnings on Tuesday, December 3, 2024. Analysts are predicting an earnings per share (EPS) of -$0.67 for the company. Shareholders are eagerly anticipating the upcoming announcement, hoping that Inotiv will exceed these expectations and provide optimistic guidance for the following quarter. This information is essential for new investors seeking insights into the company's financial performance. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Portuguese commercial bank releases financial report for first 9 months of 2024. #BancoComercialPortuguês
Intel has appointed two interim co-CEOs after replacing Gelsinger.
US ISM Mfg. New Orders Index Actual 50.4 (Forecast 48, Previous 47.1)
New collaboration between got milk? and Milk Bar introduces limited edition holiday cookie cereal, now available nationwide.
news.summary: The popular holiday treat is officially launched across the nation and at Milk Bar stores ahead of the festive season. In a recent collaboration between the renowned brands ‘got milk?’ and Milk Bar, customers can now enjoy an exclusive offering that promises to evoke nostalgia and delight taste buds. The limited-time product is available starting December 2, 2024, ensuring consumers can savor this special treat during the holiday period.

news.headline: dōTERRA Healing Hands aims to raise $100,000 on Giving Tuesday, matching up to $50,000 to build a school in India.
news.summary: The dōTERRA Healing Hands Foundation has joined forces with Rising Star Outreach on Giving Tuesday to raise funds for constructing a school in Leprosy-affected Communities in India. They are matching donations up to $50,000 to support this cause. This initiative is aimed at providing education and opportunities to those living in these communities.

news.headline: MediaGo upgraded five deep learning models to improve conversion rates accurately. San Francisco, Dec. 2, 2024.
news.summary: In San Francisco on December 2, 2024, MediaGo, an intelligent advertising platform utilizing deep learning technology, revealed a significant enhancement to its deep learning models. This upgrade allows the models to effectively evaluate traffic quality, facilitating intelligent bidding for advertisements. This development showcases MediaGo's commitment to improving its technology to better serve its users.

news.headline: Aerospace expert Wallis Laughrey joins Voyager Space as Chief Strategy Officer, formerly of Anduril Industries.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in Denver, Voyager, a prominent company specializing in national security and space technology, revealed the selection of Wallis Laughrey as their new Chief Strategy Officer. Laughrey, previously associated with Anduril Industries, brings more than 25 years of experience in the aerospace and defense sector to the role. This strategic move showcases Voyager's commitment to enhancing its leadership team with top talent from the industry.

news.headline: Thoma Bravo sells controlling stake in Veriforce to Apax Partners, a global provider of SCRM solutions.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in Miami, Thoma Bravo, a prominent software investment company, finalized the sale of its majority ownership in Veriforce, a worldwide supplier of supply chain risk management ("SCRM") solutions, to funds guided by Apax Partners LLP. The financial details of the transaction were not disclosed.

news.headline: DELFI Diagnostics appoints Dr. Amoolya Singh as Chief Technology Officer to lead technological advancements.
news.summary: In a bid to revolutionize cancer diagnostics, DELFI Diagnostics, Inc. has made a strategic appointment aimed at enhancing the company's technology leadership. The appointment was announced in Baltimore and Palo Alto on December 2, 2024. DELFI Diagnostics is known for its development of accessible blood-based liquid biopsy tests. This move comes as the company aims to strengthen its position in the field of cancer diagnostics, emphasizing innovation and progress in the sector.

news.headline: Oritain named Smart Innovator in Sustainable Product Traceability Software by Verdantix 2024 report.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Oritain, a renowned provider of product origin authentication services, revealed its selection in the Verdantix 2024 Smart Innovators: Sustainable Product and Materials Traceability Software analysis. Oritain was commended for its cutting-edge functionality, solidifying its position as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: DataBank recognized for 205.86% revenue growth on Deloitte Technology Fast 500. Demand for data center space drives success.
news.summary: DataBank has recognized a remarkable 205.86% revenue growth attributed to the surging demand for data center space from enterprises, hyperscale cloud services, and AI workloads. This marks the second consecutive year of substantial recognition for the company. The growth was reported in Dallas on December 2, 2024. DataBank is a prominent provider of enterprise-class edge colocation and interconnection services.

news.headline: Online travel market to exceed €1 trillion by 2032, with bookings reaching 65% of global market by 2026. AI and mobile apps driving industry growth.
news.summary: A report on the online travel, accommodation, and airline booking markets has been newly available, revealing key insights. It indicates that online travel bookings are projected to constitute 65% of the global market by 2026. Furthermore, the online travel market is forecasted to surpass €1 trillion by 2032. The evolution of digital platforms such as OTAs, social media, and mobile applications is drastically transforming the global travel industry. It is anticipated that by 2026, 65% of travel bookings will be conducted online, with mobile devices accounting for more than half of the traffic on travel websites. The integration of artificial intelligence (AI) and other technologies is expected to further enhance the efficiency and convenience of online travel services.

news.headline: Sharp Business Systems San Diego named a Top Workplace 2024 by Union Tribune San Diego, sponsored by Energage LLC.
news.summary: A branch of Sharp Business Systems (SBS) in San Diego, California, operated by Sharp Imaging and Information Company of America (SIICA), has been granted the Top Workplaces 2024 distinction by Energage LLC. The award, received on December 2, 2024, signifies outstanding workplace conditions in the San Diego branch. This accolade reflects the commitment of SBS to creating a desirable work environment, with employees at the forefront and is a testament to the positive work culture fostered by the company.

news.headline: BitGo launches retail platform providing digital asset trading, staking, wallets, and custody services globally. Live at bitgo.com/welcome.
news.summary: BitGo, a digital asset solutions infrastructure provider established in 2013 and trusted by institutions, has recently unveiled its dedicated retail platform in Palo Alto, California. The platform offers retail customers access to a wide range of regulated and secure digital asset services, including trading, staking, wallets, and qualified custody. It is now accessible to global investors and can be signed up for at bitgo.com/welcome. U.S.-based investors meeting the eligibility criteria can utilize the platform for their digital asset needs.

news.headline: Seno Medical receives Innovative Technology contract for Imagio Breast Imaging System from Vizient, Inc. Dec 2, 2024.
news.summary: Seno Medical has recently been awarded an Innovative Technology contract by Vizient, Inc., a leading healthcare provider in the United States. This contract pertains to Seno Medical's Imagio® Breast Imaging System, a product aimed at enhancing healthcare practices. The Imagio® Breast Imaging System is expected to bring significant improvements to the healthcare industry. The contract was finalized on December 2, 2024, in San Antonio. Vizient, Inc. is recognized as the largest provider-driven healthcare organization in the nation. This partnership is set to benefit a wide range of healthcare facilities across the country and underscores the growing importance of advanced technology in the medical field.

news.headline: Webinar by Technavio on packaging trends, sustainability, and consumer insights to guide businesses amidst industry transformation.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in New York, the packaging sector is experiencing significant changes influenced by advancements, sustainability practices, and shifting consumer preferences. Technavio is organizing a webinar to aid companies in adapting to this evolving industry. The webinar titled "Unlocking Insights in the Packaging Sector" will delve into the latest trends and strategies. Join us to explore the future of packaging, with a focus on innovation and meeting consumer needs.

news.headline: Trump faces challenges in removing NLRB members; experts say it will not be smooth sailing.
news.summary: Former officials and federal worker attorneys caution that any Trump administration effort to oust National Labor Relations Board members may face logistical hurdles.

news.headline: Elecq, a smart charging solutions company, expands to Amazon US with its Elecq Home Level 2 EV Charger known for efficiency and safety.
news.summary: Elecq, a leading company specializing in smart charging solutions, has recently introduced its Elecq Home Level 2 EV Charger on Amazon US as of December 2, 2024. This AC charger is known for its exceptional efficiency, safety features, and commitment to environmental sustainability. The charger has garnered significant attention for its innovative design and functionality.

news.headline: Marriott opens Khao Lak Marriott Beach Resort & Spa in Southern Thailand, offering exceptional service and world-class facilities.
news.summary: Luxury awaits at a beachfront location in Bangkok, featuring top-notch facilities and design that pays homage to the local heritage. The hotel belongs to the Marriott Hotels® brand under Marriott Bonvoy, a global giant in the hospitality industry. Visitors can expect exceptional service and enriching experiences during their stay at this prime location. The news was announced on December 2, 2024, through PRNewswire, highlighting the world-class amenities and thoughtful touches that set this hotel apart.
